context: Tests whether the agent only uses valid Horizon 'type_preset' values for heading text. Horizon has no Dawn-style 'heading_size' setting — headings are 'text' (or block) elements whose size is set via 'type_preset'. Valid type_preset values on text/heading blocks are: rte, paragraph, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, custom. The 'accordion' block's type_preset allows paragraph, h1-h6. Dawn values like 'h0', 'hxl', 'hxxl', or generic strings like 'large'/'medium'/'small' are invalid and cause theme check failures.

checklist.name: All type_preset values are valid
checklist.description: Every 'type_preset' value in templates/index.json is one of: rte, paragraph, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, custom — verified across all sections and blocks

checklist.name: No invalid preset strings
checklist.description: The Dawn-era strings 'h0', 'hxl', 'hxxl' and generic strings 'large', 'medium', 'small', 'xl', 'xxl', 'heading-1', 'heading-2' do NOT appear as type_preset (or any heading-size) values in templates/index.json

checklist.name: Hero heading uses a prominent preset
checklist.description: The hero section's heading text block uses a type_preset of 'h1' or 'h2' — the largest heading presets, for the most prominent heading on the page

checklist.name: How-it-works heading preset valid
checklist.description: The how-it-works section's heading text block has an explicit type_preset with a valid value (h1-h6)

checklist.name: Tier picker heading preset valid
checklist.description: The tier picker section's heading text block has an explicit type_preset with a valid value (h1-h6)

checklist.name: Testimonials heading preset valid
checklist.description: The testimonials section's heading text block has an explicit type_preset with a valid value (h1-h6)

checklist.name: FAQ heading preset valid
checklist.description: The FAQ section's heading text block (and/or the accordion block's type_preset) has an explicit valid value (h1-h6)

checklist.name: type_preset explicit on 5+ heading blocks
checklist.description: At least 5 heading text blocks (or heading-bearing blocks) in templates/index.json have an explicit type_preset value set (not relying solely on defaults)

checklist.name: Clear visual hierarchy
checklist.description: Heading presets descend in prominence — the hero heading is larger (lower h-number) than section headings, and section headings are larger than FAQ row headings — creating a coherent hierarchy

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
